keyPoints: Precisely specify the deliberate-difficulty intervention (pause-and-synthesize after AI suggestions) plus explicit integration of domain-specific constraints.
Frame and justify a 12-month, multi-domain randomized or well-powered quasi-experiment with preregistration to test long-term effects.
Define and measure the triad: long-term retention, transfer to novel problems, and expert-rated idea quality, plus process and metacognition metrics.
Anchor the design in mechanisms (retrieval practice, cueing, metacognition, cognitive apprenticeship) to explain how prompts drive outcomes.
Address practical risks (overreliance, cognitive load, trust) and preserve human oversight and ethical considerations in AI-assisted work.
Translate findings into actionable design heuristics for AI toolmakers, concrete use protocols for knowledge workers, and social norms that uphold human judgment and discernment.
